name: Acorn-Squash Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease or line muffin pans.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Mix well.
4. Add eggs, mashed acorn squash, butter, and sugar. Beat just until mixed; the batter should not be smooth.
5. Spoon batter into prepared muffin pans, filling each cup almost to the top.
6. Bake for about 15 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and serve warm. Makes 12 muffins.
